description: You are a floral designer opening a new retail shop in a leased open-plan commercial unit. Design a functional floor plan in Sweet Home 3D that separates retail from production spaces. Your design must include at least 4 partition walls creating an enclosed walk-in cooler and a back-of-house wet workspace, with at least 2 doors for access. Define and name at least 3 rooms (e.g., 'Retail Storefront', 'Walk-in Cooler', 'Workspace') and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 2 of them. Furnish the workspace with at least 2 sinks and 3 large desks or tables, and the retail area with at least 5 display shelves, a checkout counter, and 3 chairs or sofas. The completed shop should contain at least 10 botanical items and a minimum of 35 total furniture items sourced from the built-in catalog. Save the final design.
